mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM site s LEFT JOIN site_employee_map sem ON sem.id_site = s.id WHERE s.is_delete = 0 AND s.`status` = 1
AND sem.id_employee = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM site s
JOIN site_employee_map sem ON sem.id_site = s.id
JOIN device d ON d.id_site = s.id JOIN alert a ON a.id_device = d.id JOIN error e ON e.id = a.id_error WHERE s.`status` = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.`is_delete` = 0 AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND s.enable_alert = 1
AND sem.id_employee = #{id_employee} AND sem.is_hiding = 0
